heading: Today
text: Periods of morning clouds, thicker northeast, then sunshine mixing with clouds.  Hot and humid.  A rising chance of late-day showers and thunderstorms in Quebec, edging into northern areas.  Highs in the low to mid 90s, a few 80s closer to the mountains.  Winds south to southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Numerous showers and thunderstorms from the Adirondacks, Rt. 2, and 302 north, isolated south.  Storms may contain damaging winds, hail, and heavy rain.  Lows in the 60s to low 70s.  Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Wednesday
text: A chance of a stray morning shower, then increasing sunshine.  Not as warm, with decreasing humidity.  Highs 80 to 90 north to south.  Winds becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
